caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white and light green letters. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background contains a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, clothing racks, and walls decorated with numerous framed photos. In the lower corners of the scene, logos for "THEY" and "ROLLY" are visible. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts from a wide, open-mouthed laugh with his eyes closed to a more neutral, closed-mouth smile as he looks toward someone off-camera. His head tilts slightly throughout the movements, but his position relative to the microphone and the surrounding environment remains constant.
